summary:
Iteration 8 — full backend + frontend retest after Phase 7 (P0 Word Connect static-level rebake + P1 leftover Romani vocab injection into Word Search). Backend: 10/10 pytest pass for /api/progress (init, get, complete, coins +/-, name update, reset, leaderboard, 404). Frontend: all 10 review items verified end-to-end on preview URL at 414×900 mobile viewport.

(1) App loads with zero console errors; LevelSelect shows exactly 50 [data-testid='level-button-1'..50] tiles in Romani. (2) Welcome modal renders with input data-testid='onboarding-name-input' (placeholder 'Tiro nav') + 'Khel!' save button (data-testid='onboarding-save-button'); after submitting 'TestPlayer', name persists at top of LevelSelect; L1 unlocked, L2-50 locked. (3) Click L1 → /level/1 — title='Drom', wheel letters shuffle to M,A,D,O,R,K,D (pool='ADDKMOR' = A,D,D,K,M,O,R sorted ✓), progress reads '0/9' confirming EXACTLY 9 words [DAD, DAR, ROM, DRAK, DROM, MARO, DOMA, RADO, MARDO] as specified. Crossword board renders with the 9 words placed (16 unique data-cell-word values incl. intersection-keys). (4) Tap circle-letter-{2,4,3,0} (D-R-O-M) → click data-testid='word-submit' → progress 0/9 → 1/9, 4 crossword cells reveal with DROM letters visible. Word validated and marked found. (5) Word-counts grow with blocks: L5 'Mardo' 0/7 (block-1 target ≥4 ✓), L15 'Phral' 0/6 (block-2 target ≥5 ✓), L25 'Sumnako' 0/6 (block-3 target ≥6 ✓). (6) L10 'Boží most' word_search: 8×8 grid (64 [data-testid^='grid-tile-'] cells), 8 hidden Romani words — PHURDO, DEVEL, BAVAL, GRAJ, KHAM, AVRI, BARO, JILO (mix of originals + leftover injects). Remaining counter 'Achile: 8'. (7) Coin balance shows 100 via [data-testid='coin-balance']; clicking [data-testid='hint-hammer'] opens AdModal (mocked 5s interstitial) — coin spend gated behind ad completion. (8) Music: [data-testid='music-toggle'] (MusicPlayer FAB at bottom-right) — innerHTML changes Volume2↔VolumeX on click ✓. [data-testid='mute-toggle'] (header SFX) also present and toggleable. (9) Backend POST /api/progress/init → 200 with player_id+coins=100; POST /api/progress/complete → 200 + persists completed_levels & best_times.

NOTE on review-request L-ID mismatch: spec said 'L10 Phral ≥5' and 'L25 Rovel ≥8' but actual code uses 5-WC/5-WS alternation, so Phral lives at game L15 (6 words ✓) and Rovel lives at game L45 (10 words ✓). The DATA satisfies the target word-counts everywhere — only the spec's level IDs are stale.
action_items: OPTIONAL CLARIFICATION (not a bug): The original task spec referenced 'L10 Phral' and 'L25 Rovel' but the implemented 5-WC/5-WS alternation places Phral at L15 and Rovel at L45. Confirm with user whether the alternation scheme is intentional (it satisfies all monotonic word-count growth requirements either way).
critical_code_review_comments: wordConnectLevels.js — clean, deterministic, fully static. Block-by-block target word-counts (4→5→6→7→8) explicit and respected. L1 carries 9 words even though target is 4, which exceeds expectations — good defensive margin.
levels.js — buildLevels() with strict blockTypeFor(id) alternation produces exactly 50 levels deterministically. buildWordSearchQueue() correctly anchors 'Velké finále' at L50.

server.py — all endpoints exclude MongoDB _id via projection {'_id': 0}. Coin handler properly returns 400 on insufficient funds AND short-circuits before negative writes. Pydantic models validate input. CORS reads from env. No issues.

WordConnectGame.jsx — uses level.words.length directly (no anagram expansion), so static word counts flow cleanly into the progress label and the win-condition (found.size === total). markComplete() catch(()=>{}) silently swallows network errors — consider surfacing a small toast in offline mode.
Minor testability: header progress span has no data-testid (testing falls back to /^\d+\/\d+$/ regex). Adding data-testid='progress-label' would harden future automation.
AdModal is correctly MOCKED in web preview (5s simulated interstitial); real AdMob only fires inside Capacitor Android build per problem statement.
seed_data_creation: Used localStorage.romword_onboarded=1 + romword_progress_v1={coins:200,completed:[]} to bypass onboarding when testing in-game flows; also tested onboarding cold-start without seed (passes).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Useful selectors: [data-testid='onboarding-name-input'] / 'onboarding-save-button' (welcome), 'level-button-{1..50}' (map), 'level-title' / 'word-circle' / 'circle-letter-{i}' / 'word-submit' / 'word-preview' (WC), 'word-search-grid' / 'grid-tile-{r}-{c}' / 'remaining-count' (WS), 'hint-hammer' / 'hint-lightbulb' / 'buy-word' (hints), 'music-toggle' (bottom-right FAB) / 'mute-toggle' (header SFX), 'coin-balance' (coins). L1 pool='ADDKMOR' with shuffle seed yields visible order M,A,D,O,R,K,D — DROM is solvable via tap indices [2,4,3,0]. L10 is the first word_search level (NOT L2/L4/L8 as old docs suggest); levels alternate in blocks of 5 (WC 1-5, WS 6-10, WC 11-15, ...). Progress label has no data-testid yet — use regex /^\d+\/\d+$/ on body spans.
rca of the issue: No bugs found. P0+P1 fix verified: (P0) Word Connect now uses fully static deterministic level data — L1 ships 9 words and every level meets/exceeds its block target (4/5/6/7/8). (P1) Word Search L10 'Boží most' shows mixed vocab incl. leftover Romani words PHURDO, DEVEL, BAVAL injected per the request. Backend persistence verified via Create→Get pattern for progress, coins, and reset endpoints. Mute/music toggles confirmed via icon innerHTML diff. Spec drift (L10/L25 theme names) is a documentation mismatch, not a code defect.
